name: e2e-demo-surfaces-v1
description: Render real E2E proof artifacts as high-quality product surfaces on clawea-www and clawsig-explorer, using the frontend-skill UI bar.

userStories.title: Seed E2E demo surfaces roadmap and tracker
userStories.description: As the canonical planner, I need a roadmap and Beads issue set for E2E demo surfaces so the work is tracked in the same system as product execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Add docs/roadmaps/e2e-demo-surfaces-v1/README.md, prd.json, and progress.txt
Add a Beads epic plus wave-1 child stories
Explicitly record frontend-skill as the UI/UX bar for this roadmap
userStories.notes: Seeded roadmap folder, added Beads epic/stories, and documented ~/.agents/skills/frontend-skill/SKILL.md as the mandatory UI guide for the tranche.

userStories.title: Public-facing workflow demo on clawea-www
userStories.description: As a buyer or stakeholder, I need a polished narrative page that shows PR proof, bundle review, and arena decision workflows using real artifact-backed examples instead of abstract claims.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a dedicated public page under clawea-www
Use real artifact-derived data points for each workflow
Update existing case-study / proof-points surfaces to route people into the new page
userStories.notes: Added /case-studies/e2e-proof-workflows with real artifact anchors, plus new entry points from /case-studies and /proof-points.

userStories.title: Operator-facing workflow showcase on clawsig-explorer
userStories.description: As an operator or reviewer, I need a utility-first explorer page that summarizes the same workflows with concrete evidence anchors, quick links, and review-ready metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a dedicated explorer route for the showcase
Summarize all three workflows with reviewer-friendly metrics and source artifact anchors
Expose the showcase from existing explorer navigation
userStories.notes: Added /showcase/e2e in clawsig-explorer and linked it in explorer nav.

userStories.title: Generated artifact registry for demo surfaces
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need the public and operator demo pages to read from a generated artifact registry instead of hard-coded constants so the content can be refreshed from real evidence with one command.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a script that reads the canonical source artifacts and writes a generated registry JSON
Update clawea-www and clawsig-explorer demo pages to consume the generated registry
Expose registry freshness / source artifact paths in the rendered surfaces
userStories.notes: Added scripts/ops/generate-e2e-demo-registry.mjs and registry JSON imports in both surfaces.

userStories.title: Reviewer drill-downs from showcase into inspect, run, and arena
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I need the operator showcase to connect cleanly into the relevant explorer surfaces so I can move from workflow overview into the exact page used for bundle review, run review, or arena review without losing context.
acceptanceCriteria: Add shared workflow-context drill-down UI on inspect, run, and arena surfaces
Add showcase links that target the new drill-down anchors where applicable
Keep the copy utility-first and evidence-linked rather than marketing-oriented
userStories.notes: Added shared e2e-workflow helper and workflow-context cards on inspect, run, and arena surfaces, plus deeper showcase links.

userStories.title: Staging-safe demo snapshots from repo-contained evidence
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need the demo registry to derive from repo-contained, staging-safe snapshots instead of local /tmp inputs so the demo can be regenerated in CI and shared reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a snapshot generator that traces a repo-contained proof bundle and emits stable public-safe snapshot JSON under artifacts/ops/e2e-demo/
Update the registry generator to consume snapshot artifacts rather than local /tmp-only sources
Refresh generated registries so bundle-review data points come from repo-contained evidence
userStories.notes: Added scripts/ops/generate-e2e-demo-snapshots.mjs and snapshot outputs under artifacts/ops/e2e-demo/public plus traced settlement-prod bundle output.

userStories.title: Scheduled refresh workflow for demo artifacts and registries
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need a scheduled/manual workflow that regenerates the demo snapshots and registries in CI so the artifact pack stays refreshable without local state.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a GitHub Actions workflow with schedule + workflow_dispatch
Run snapshot generation, registry generation, typechecks, and diff sanity check
Upload refreshed demo artifacts as workflow artifacts

metadata.status: Complete — Waves 1-3 shipped, deployed to staging + production on 2026-03-22, feature packaged in PR #539
